attributes.action: Remove exemptions so full-stun non-recoverable animal slaughter is mandatory
attributes.additional_details: Animal welfare should be a priority from birth to death. Full non-recoverable stun is the most humane method of slaughter.
attributes.background: Welfare of Animals at the Time of Killing Regulations 2015 whereby animals can be killed with partial recoverable stun or no stun at all. RSPCA welfare standards call for full non-recoverable stun - this should be mandatory for all UK and Northern Ireland abbatoirs

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject, which you may want to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762116
